name: Eloquent
body: The silver tongue: starts with the most words (1d6+4 instead of 1d6+2) and wins arguments — +1 to Forced Resolution rolls.
Considers self wildly persuasive. Is not.

name: Strong
body: A tower of muscle: Damage 2 — when you club somebody, he stays clubbed. Throws rocks 65 ft.
Solves most problems by being heavier than them.

name: Learned
body: The clan genius, which is a low bar. Picks six abilities instead of three, and is the ONLY class that can Build, make Fire, or Draw (all exclusive).
Can make fire and wishes to be worshipped for it.

name: Fast
body: Fleet of foot: succeeds at Run Away (and Tiptoe) on anything but a 1, and goes first on initiative ties.
First to flee. Survives.

name: Tough
body: Made of tougher stuff: the most Ungggh in the clan (1d6+6 at creation). Resistance succeeds on anything but a 1 — shrugs off leech venom, sleep-grogginess, bad ideas.

name: Banging
body: Born with a rock in hand: hits on a 4 instead of 5 — hits more often than anyone.
Response to every problem is to bang it. There is no problem banging cannot worsen.

name: Grunting
body: The mysterious one. Once per scene: flap, chant, and roll 2d6.
**Doubles** = a miracle saves the day (a perfectly-timed pterodactyl drops a turtle on the problem).
**Double 1s (snake eyes)** = something far worse. Unpredictable salvation, accidental catastrophe.

name: Grok
subtitle: Eloquent — the silver tongue

meta.Words: YOU · ME · FOOD · GO · BANG · THING (6!)

body: Knows the most words and will not let anyone forget it. Wins Forced Resolutions on a +1. Considers self wildly persuasive; is not.
Best at: bossing the clan, fast-talking other tribes, claiming credit for the pterodactyl.

name: Thudd
subtitle: Strong — a tower of muscle
body: When you club somebody, he stays clubbed. Throws rocks 65 ft. Solves most problems by being heavier than them.
Best at: gang-felling the Cave Bear, hurling rocks at the saucer, moving the big slab.

name: Ugma
subtitle: Learned — the clan genius (low bar)

meta.Abilities: Run Away · Build · Fire · Draw · Cook · Forage · Fish

body: Can make fire and wishes to be worshipped for it. Build/Fire/Draw are exclusive — only Ugma can do them. Builds the saucer-sabotage gizmo.
Best at: explaining plans via stick-figures, being smug.

name: Zee
subtitle: Fast — fleet of foot
body: First to flee, succeeds at Run Away on anything but a 1, goes first on initiative ties. Survives.
Best at: scouting the marsh, escaping the leech, luring astronauts toward the tar.

name: Bonk
subtitle: Tough — made of tougher stuff
body: Most Ungggh in the clan. Resistance succeeds on anything but a 1 — shrugs off leech venom, sleep-grogginess, bad ideas.
Best at: tanking the saucer's ray, wading the marsh, the Skull Thickness Demonstration.

name: Krunk
subtitle: Banging — born with a rock in hand
body: Hits on a 4 — more often than anyone. Response to every problem is to bang it. There is no problem banging cannot worsen.
Best at: Hunt to weaken the bear, banging the saucer.

name: Mun
subtitle: Grunting — the mysterious one

meta.Abilities: Run Away · Hide · Forage · Climb + GRUNTING

body: Once per scene, grunt & flap: roll 2d6. Doubles = a miracle saves the day. Snake eyes = something far worse.
Best at: the turtle-dropping pterodactyl, inexplicable salvation, accidental catastrophe.

name: Thag
subtitle: The clan's wisest grunting elder
body: The clan's wisest grunting elder and best forager — gone from his bearskin the morning the adventure starts. Round footprints, singed-hair smell.
He is inside the saucer, half-probed, being shown a diagram of a pyramid he will never, ever understand. Freed, he immediately tries to climb back in — the pyramid diagram was just getting good.
His necklace turns up in the marsh, snagged on a reed over a tar pit.
